# pointPixelScale

**Instance Property**

The scaling factor used to translate screen points into pixels.

## Declaration

```swift
var pointPixelScale: Float { get }
```

## Filter properties

- **contentRect**: The size and location of the content to filter, in screen points.
- **streamType**: The type of the streaming content.
- **SCStreamType**: The display type of the presented stream.
- **style**: The display style of the sharable content.
